title: senecio tocomarensis
intro: Senecio tocomarensis, also known as Tocomarí or Tocomahuite, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's leaves and roots are rich in sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects, providing potential health benefits in reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, Senecio tocomarensis is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in folk remedies for its antiseptic and antispasmodic properties.
